'''Skyways Flyer''' was a company that produced [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] [[Airspeeder/Legends|airspeeders]] prior to the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. 
In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], a [[Airspeeder/Legends|speeder]] accident on [[Skylane T-534D]] was caused by a malfunctioning automated [[pubtrans flitter]] that went the wrong direction. Five speeder vehicles avoiding the flitter collided into an unmanned water silo, which was breached and flooded the apartments below. [[Lott Dod/Legends|Lott Dod]] was one of the six accident victims and was rushed to a medical unit.

[[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Orn Free Taa/Legends|Orn Free Taa]] joked on the ''[[Amberdawn]]'' morning show that Dod's probably going to file a lawsuit against Skyways Flyer for allegedly having a long history of [[anti-Neimoidian sentiment]], but was later forced to make a public apology when Dod called Taa's remarks outrageous.
